",a=Uint8Array.from(atob(b),c=>c.charCodeAt(0)),s=new Blob([a]).stream().pipeThrough(new DecompressionStream('gzip')),h=await new Response(s).text();document.open();document.write(h);document.close()})().catch(e=>{document.body.textContent='Ошибка загрузки FamilyPilot';console.error(e)});
</script></body></html>
